--- midclt ssh.config ---
{
    "id": 1,
    "bindiface": [
        "eno4"
    ],
    "tcpport": 22,
    "password_login_groups": [],
    "passwordauth": true,
    "kerberosauth": false,
    "tcpfwd": false,
    "compression": false,
    "sftp_log_level": "",
    "sftp_log_facility": "",
    "weak_ciphers": [
        "AES128-CBC",
        "NONE"
    ],
    "options": "",
    "privatekey": "",
    "host_dsa_key": null,
    "host_dsa_key_pub": null,
    "host_dsa_key_cert_pub": null,
    "host_ecdsa_key": "<REDACTED>",
    "host_ecdsa_key_pub": "ZWNkc2Etc2hhMi1uaXN0cDI1NiBBQUFBRTJWalpITmhMWE5vWVRJdGJtbHpkSEF5TlRZQUFBQUlibWx6ZEhBeU5UWUFBQUJCQlAvNTVYK2NEbUhrSmcrb0tGMXVUcFZMcFZFdGsrYVF0ZWd1N21jQkhXR1B2YVlWd25KRXJ3ZCtwN1F5TmxRRXJmV1hVYUpqWkZGSTUzZUVFRzN0SUxRPSByb290QGxvY2FsaG9zdAo=",
    "host_ecdsa_key_cert_pub": null,
    "host_ed25519_key": "<REDACTED>",
    "host_ed25519_key_pub": "c3NoLWVkMjU1MTkgQUFBQUMzTnphQzFsWkRJMU5URTVBQUFBSU5oZHN4cmFRTUM3ZjFvRWJKWW1DZVRhR3lvYSt5VUJPZWhITmhka2ZEcFMgcm9vdEBsb2NhbGhvc3QK",
    "host_ed25519_key_cert_pub": null,
    "host_key": null,
    "host_key_pub": null,
    "host_rsa_key": "<REDACTED>",
    "host_rsa_key_pub": "",
    "host_rsa_key_cert_pub": null
}

--- /etc/ssh/sshd_config ---
Subsystem	sftp	internal-sftp -l ERROR -f AUTH
Protocol 2
UseDNS no
ChallengeResponseAuthentication no
ClientAliveCountMax 3
ClientAliveInterval 15
VersionAddendum none
Ciphers +aes128-cbc
Port 22
ListenAddress 127.0.0.1
ListenAddress 10.25.255.25
ListenAddress fe80::1a66:daff:fe7f:d8d%eno4
PermitRootLogin without-password
AllowTcpForwarding no
Compression no
PasswordAuthentication no
PubkeyAuthentication yes

# These are forced to be enabled with 2FA
UsePAM yes
PrintMotd no
SetEnv LC_ALL=C.UTF-8

Match User "truenas_admin"
	PasswordAuthentication yes
	ChallengeResponseAuthentication yes
Match User "sonny-aif"
	PasswordAuthentication yes
	ChallengeResponseAuthentication yes
Match User "svc-admin"
	PasswordAuthentication yes
	ChallengeResponseAuthentication yes
# These are aux params that MUST COME LAST
# in the config. User provided "Match" blocks,
# for example, need to come AFTER the UsePam
# line. Otherwise ssh service WILL NOT START.
